title: Skill Manifest
description: Formal contract for a skill plug-in folder (skill.json alongside skills.md, prompts and tools). Skills are validatable, composable and swappable units of domain knowledge.

instructions.description: Relative path to the skills.md instructions document.

prompts.description: Relative paths to prompt fragment files contributed by this skill.

tools.description: Relative path to a tools.json declaring tools this skill provides.

embeddings.description: Relative paths of documents to embed into the memory of agents equipped with this skill.

dependencies.description: Ids of skills this skill depends on.

compatibleAgents.description: Agent ids or roles this skill is compatible with. Empty means any.
